title: herminium coeloceras
intro: Herminium coeloceras, also known as Coeloglossum viride, is a rare and endangered species of orchid native to Europe and Asia. It is a type of terrestrial orchid characterized by its unique greenish-yellow flowers with a distinctive yellow lip. The medicinal properties of Herminium coeloceras include its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which have been traditionally used to treat wounds, skin conditions, and respiratory issues. Herbal preparations of the plant, such as infusions and decoctions, are often used to promote digestion, reduce fever, and alleviate coughs and colds, while also offering antioxidant and immunomodulatory effects.
